posts.title: Agentic AI in regulated organisations: govern the loop, not just the model
posts.summary: Model-level controls are table stakes. The risk — and the value — of agentic systems lives in the loop: tools, memory, delegation, and the humans around them.

posts.title: Zero downtime is a governance outcome
posts.summary: Our core-banking migration went live with zero downtime. The heroics happened months earlier, in decision structures — not in the go-live weekend.
